item.title: AUS 2026 Intel Panel: Standing Offer for Market Intelligence Services
item.description: The Lead Customer is proposing to establish a Standing Offer Arrangement to cover Industry and Market Insights Services that assist the Lead Customer and the broader Government procure external services to supplement our work in assisting Australian companies export and find new markets for their products and services.

item.title: Health/E25-370111: Provision of Senior Director Services for the Food Regulation System Office
item.description: The Department of Health, Disability and Ageing is seeking to engage a contractor to provide services of a Senior Director to support the bi?national Food Regulation System Office.

item.title: S-EST11098: Porton Barracks Roof Replacement, QLD
item.description: Porton Barracks Roof Replacement Works

item.title: FIN-2024-25-00821: Provision of Security Guarding and Concierge Services
item.description: Provision of Security Guarding and Concierge Services

item.title: Health/E25-414650: Administration of the Insulin Pump Program
item.description:
The Department of Health, Disability and Ageing requires the services of a program administrator for the Insulin Pump Program.

The Department is seeking Tenders for a program administrator which will be engaged to provide services in relation to the Insulin Pump Program, including managing the application process, engaging with applicants and their health care team and supporting the distribution of insulin pumps to eligible participants.

item.title: ATM_2025_3218: Digital Forensic Services for Investigations Branch
item.description: Digital forensic services enable investigators to find information stored digitally and to progress investigations and where appropriate, provide the evidentiary basis to progress criminal, civil or regulatory actions.

item.title: 11849: Mutitjulu Essential Services and Renewables Project
item.description:
The Director of National Parks will upgrade aging infrastructure within the remote Indigenous community of Mutitjulu, nestled within Uluru-Kata Tjuta National Park.

This critical project prioritises the delivery of reliable Essential Services and Renewables while minimising environmental impact and fostering long-term development for the community with new infrastructure compliant to current standards.

item.title: IPINFRA-MS-2026-00: MAINTENANCE AND LIVING SERVICES CONTRACT - HMPNGS TARANGAU PNG
item.description:
THIS IS A NOTICE OF AN UPCOMING TENDER ONLY. PLEASE DO NOT SUBMIT RESPONSES TO THIS NOTICE. THE UPCOMING TENDER WILL BE RELEASED APPROXIMATELY 31 MARCH 2026 WITH THE ATM ID IPINFRA-MS-2026-01

Contract for the provision of maintenance and sustainment activities at HMPNGS Tarangau and Australian Compounds, and the delivery of Living Services at the Australian Compounds located within the footprint of HMPNGS Tarangau (Lombrum) On Manus Island in Papua New Guinea

item.title: CKI HV 10032223: High Voltage Cable and Substation Renewal - Cocos (Keeling) Islands 2026
item.description: This Approach to Market (ATM) is for the provision of electrical and civil services to install new 11,000V underground electrical cable on West Island, Cocos (Keeling) Islands

item.title: 26ACMA062: Van Refresh Project Part B
item.description: This Approach to Market (ATM) is for the supply, installation, and calibration of a Very High Frequency (VHF) and Ultra High Frequency (UHF) Technical Hardware Solution, to support spectrum monitoring and broadcast measurement operations undertaken by the Australian Communications and Media Authority.

item.title: DPS26000757: Boiling/Chilled Water Units at APH
item.description: To establish Contract for Boiling/Chilled Water Units at APH

item.title: 25/810/013: environmental monitoring program
item.description: This Approach to Market (ATM) is for the provision of: This procurement seeks to engage a provider of services required to implement an environmental monitoring program through the engagement of accredited laboratory testing services, associated sample collection and management and data reporting.

item.description: Climate-controlled automated 47mm filter weighing system

item.title: NGA26-009: Sanitary Services
item.description: The National Gallery of Australia requires services for Sanitary Services, to maintain the proper management of the Gallery’s sanitary waste and relevant infrastructure

item.title: 10032371: CKI Community Support and Resilience Pilot Program
item.description: The Provider will deliver coordinated, trauma informed and culturally safe services that strengthen community wellbeing, resilience, and child and family safety, particularly during periods of heightened stress associated with climate adaptation planning and child protection concerns.

item.description: Banking and Credit Card Services

item.description: The National Capital Authority is seeking responses from suitably experienced public art delivery contractors to provide the Requirement as the Contractor under the Contract.

item.title: GA2025/3369: Hydrographic Training Service Provider
item.description: IHO-recongnised hydrographic training provider

item.title: 25/918: Digital Cataloguing Solution
item.description: Digital Cataloguing Solution for the National Coin Collection

item.title: FIN-2025-26-00424: Digital ID Innovation Challenge
item.description: Innovation challenge seeking Proof of Concept (PoC) Digital ID solutions to support secure, standards?based staff onboarding across government.

item.title: S-EST10743: RAAF Pearce Building Works, WA
item.description: RAAF Pearce Building Works

item.title: ATM_2026_6011: Storage and management of the Commonwealth-owned stockpile of Technical Grade Urea (TGU)
item.description: The Department, on behalf of the Commonwealth of Australia, will extend the government-owned 7,500 tonne TGU stockpile, which was established in 2022. A supplier was contracted to manage the purchase, storage and turnover of the stockpile. The contract with the current supplier is due to expire on 30 June 2026. The Department is seeking a new open tender for the contract to store and manage the stockpile.

item.title: WS2975015896: RFI Airservices Australia Ballina Phase 2 interim Control Tower Solution
item.description: Airservices seeks to understand the current landscape of companies supplying control tower solutions.

item.description: Architectural and Building Project Management Services.

item.description: Manufacture of integrated systems for Generation 2 ReefScan Surface and/or post-delivery support including servicing, upgrades, and fault resolution for ReefScan clients

item.title: SWA_ATM_2026/07: 2026 Review if the Deemed Diseases List
item.description: Provision of a technical expert to evaluate the current list of deemed diseases in Australia.

item.description: The purpose of this Expression of Interest (EOI) is for ANSTO to understand current market capabilities, relevant experience, delivery methodologies, and compliance frameworks for the provision of Asbestos and Environmental Management Consultancy Services.

item.title: JSD/RFT/74800/1: Land Command, Control, Communications and Compute (C4) Panel for Services
item.description: The Commonwealth requires a range of technical specialist services to support the continued evolution and modernisation of the LC4 capability system and seeks to establish a Standing Offer Panel for Services

item.title: PROC-8377: Government Investigations Training
item.description: The National Disability Insurance Agency (the Agency) is seeking to engage one or more Registered Training Organisations (RTOs) to deliver Government Investigations training to staff.

item.title: 10031874: Environmental Planning and Assessment Adviser (EPAA)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced Environmental Planning and Assessment Adviser to act as a learned adviser and expert for the development of a nationally integrated high speed rail network.

item.title: 10031872: Business Operations and Maintenance Adviser (BOMA)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced Business Operations and Maintenance Adviser to act as a learned adviser and expert for development of a nationally integrated high speed rail network.

item.title: 10032108: Demand Forecasting Adviser (DFA)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced Demand Forecasting Adviser to act as a learned adviser and guiding technical and design expert for the development of a nationally integrated high speed rail network.

item.title: 25AMSA172: RFI - Provision of Dedicated Fixed Wing SAR Services
item.description: AMSA is seeking information from commercial aviation organisations that have, or could have, the necessary capability, skills and experience to provide dedicated fixed wing search and rescue services as outlined in this RFI.

item.title: 10031875: Strategic Property Adviser (SPA)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced Strategic Property Adviser to act as a learned adviser and expert for the development of a nationally integrated High Speed Rail (HSR) network.

item.title: 10031871: Delivery Partner (DP)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced Delivery Partner to act as a learned adviser and expert for the development of a nationally integrated high speed rail network.

item.title: DFAT-IMD-RFT-IWSS: ICT Warehouse Storage Services
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade (DFAT), requires the services of a suitably qualified and experienced service provider for the provision of Secure Offsite Storage for DFAT Information and Communications Technology (ICT) equipment.

item.title: 10031728: Technical and Architectural Adviser (TAA)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced Technical and Architectural Adviser to act as a learned adviser and guiding technical and design expert for the development of a nationally integrated high speed rail network.

item.title: 10031873: Commercial and Transaction Adviser (CATA)
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage a suitably experienced  Commercial and Transaction Adviser to act as a learned adviser and expert for the development of a nationally integrated high speed rail network.

item.title: A1304758: SPECIALISED INVESTIGATIONS PLATFORM
item.description: Request for Tender in relation to specialised investigations platform that integrates seamlessly with Microsoft Dynamics 365.

item.title: DFAT-1086: Governance in Development Helpdesk - Phase 3
item.description: Phase 3 of the Governance in Development Helpdesk (GDH 3) will support the Governance in Development Unit to ensure that DFAT staff have ongoing access to relevant governance technical expertise.

item.title: DPS26000776: Certification of Safety Equipment
item.description: This Approach to Market (ATM) is for the establishment of a Standing Offer Arrangement for the provision of Certification of Safety Equipment at Australian Parliament House (APH).

item.title: DPS26000205: Conservation Services – Parliament House Art Collections
item.description: The Department of Parliamentary Services (DPS) is seeking to engage a suitably qualified and experienced supplier to provide specialist conservation services to support the management and preservation of the Parliament House Art Collections. Services include environmental and materials analysis, conservation advice, documentation review, specialist training, and annual environmental and condition reporting for high profile collection items, including the 1297 inspeximus issue of the Magna Carta.

item.title: RFT 2025-26 003: Service Desk and IT Managed Service Provider
item.description:
Creative Australia is the Australian Government’s principal arts investment and advisory body.

We are currently seeking the services of a Service Desk (SD) and Information Technology Managed Service Provider (IT MSP) to administer and support our technology environment.

Tenderers may offer to provide either the Service Desk or the IT MSP function, or both functions.

item.description: The Australian Government agency Services Australia is seeking Expressions of Interest from organisations to provide agent services in Corryong

item.description: Request for Information on innovative technologies that ensure resilient command and control for Defence.

item.title: RFT 04-2026: Provision of catering, accommodation, reception and booking system services - Pinkenba
item.description:
The AFP requires a range of services to be delivered at the 2 sites in Pinkenba, including:

   a.         catering services including catering, external catering, bar service and coffee services

   b.         accommodation and housekeeping services for circa 160 rooms

   c.         reception and booking system services

item.title: S-EST11100: RAAF Amberley Building Refurbishment, QLD
item.description: RAAF Amberley Building Refurbishment Works

item.title: S-EST11122: HMAS Cerberus Building Refurbishment, VIC
item.description: HMAS Cerberus Building Refurbishment Works

item.title: PROC-9177400: Proof of Concept Funding - Call 1 2026
item.description:
GRDC’s purpose is to invest in research, development and extension that creates enduring profitability for Australian grain growers. To help deliver on its purpose GRDC seeks proposal for funding to support early-stage innovations that have the potential to create value for Australian grains growers and require proof of concept studies to demonstrate their feasibility and applicability to the industry.

Funding will support key early-stage research and development activities that will provide critical information to demonstrate the feasibility of the concept or innovation or support cross industry/discipline technology translation activities of existing research and development from adjacent industries. This is an open, competitive process and not all applicants may be awarded funding.

To participate in this process, applicants must be seeking funding that is no more than $250,000.00 excluding GST, with a minimum of 1:1 leveraged funding of financial commitments or in-kind equivalent. Research must align to the research and development priorities of the Australian grains industry identified in the GRDC RD&E Plan 2023-28. Proof of concept activities and milestones, including reporting, must be completely within 18 months of commencement.

item.title: 25/1513/01: Risk Assurance Advisory Services – 65MP Project
item.description: The Bank is seeking a Line 2 risk assurance advisory vendor capable of providing independent, senior?level strategic, construction, development and commercial governance advisory services to support the successful delivery of the 65 Martin Place Program.

item.title: GA2026/872: Ore geometry data compilation
item.description: Compile data on the pre-mining geometry of ore bodies across different mineral systems

item.description: The objectives of the National Justice Reinvestment Unit (NJRU) are to support and build capability for up to 30 Commonwealth- funded justice reinvestment initiatives.

item.description: Humanitarian Deployable Power Restoration Capability

item.title: ATM_2025_5550: The Great Barrier Reef Traditional Owner Led Water Quality Improvement Program
item.description:
This approach to market is seeking to engage a single contractor with relevant and appropriate expertise to: 

- establish and support each of the Traditional Owner–Led Reef Water Quality Advisory Group and Traditional Owner–Led Reef Water Quality Working Group; 

- provide advice and recommendations to assist the design of Phase Two; and 

- provide advice and assistance to potential grant applicants with grant application guidance and support for Phase Two.

item.description: This Request for Expressions of Interest invites eligible surface water holders in selected northern Murray-Darling Basin catchments, to indicate their willingness to sell water rights to the Australian Government.

item.description: This REOI is seeking proposals from private capital to inform potential co-investment into an ACI Fund(s).

item.title: NMAT2526/09: Request for Expressions of Interest – Long-term Lease of Storage Premises in Mitchell, ACT
item.description:
The National Museum of Australia (NMA) is a Commonwealth corporate entity established under the National Museum of Australia Act 1980 (Cth).

The NMA is seeking expressions of interest from interested parties willing to enter into a long-term lease for the provision of a suitable storage premises for the storage of collection items.  The storage premises will be located in the industrial area of Mitchell, ACT.

item.title: MGF_17: Supply of Medical Grade Footwear to eligible persons
item.description:
NOTE: existing suppliers need not reapply

The Medical Grade Footwear (MGF) Programme is an important part of DVA’s health care arrangements and is part of the Rehabilitation Appliance Programme (RAP).  The MGF Programme provides a nation-wide access to a wide range of MGF and related services for entitled persons.

item.title: CNS16: Department of Veterans' Affairs Community Nursing Services Invitation
item.description: Department of Veterans' Affairs invites interested suppliers of Community Nursing Services to apply to provide these services from 1 July 2016.

item.description: Demo ATM to test eLodgement and download

item.title: DPC-2017: Invitation to provide Day Procedure Centre Services to the Veteran Community
item.description: The Department of Veterans’ Affairs (DVA) is seeking to contract with eligible stand-alone private day hospitals (referred to as Day Procedure Centres or DPCs) to provide DPC services for DVA Entitled Persons across Australia from 1 October 2017 onwards.

item.title: PHS-16: Private Hospital Services
item.description: DVA is seeking the provision of Private Hospital services for Entitled Persons by publishing this Invitation to Provide Private Hospital Services to the Veteran Community.
